tasks.title: CCAS: Merge feature/hana-os-users into ccas-jenkins develop

mvp_template.doel: Merge the feature/hana-os-users branch in ccas-jenkins into develop, resolving any conflicts, and verify the Jenkinsfile-HANA-OS-Users pipeline is present on develop.
niet_in_scope: running the Jenkins pipeline against live HANA hosts
acceptatiecriteria: feature/hana-os-users merged to ccas-jenkins develop with no conflicts
Jenkinsfile-HANA-OS-Users and README-HANA-OS-Users.md present on ccas-jenkins develop
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — merge only, no new code introduced
mvp_template.tests_required: git log verify merge commit present; ls verify pipeline files present on develop
mvp_template.rollback_plan: git revert merge commit on ccas-jenkins develop

mvp_template.doel: Build a bash script that reads logs/audit.jsonl and prints a summary of agent actions grouped by agent name and action type.
acceptatiecriteria: Script exits 0 and prints action counts grouped by agent
Handles missing or empty audit.jsonl gracefully (zero counts, no errors)
Passes bash -n and shellcheck with no warnings
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — read-only, no secrets, no network calls
mvp_template.tests_required: bash -n; shellcheck; run with missing file; run with empty file; run with seeded fixture
definition_of_done: test_report.md contains PASS with >=90% pass rate
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Delete artefacts/task-002/ — no system state changed

mvp_template.doel: Build a bash script that reads queue.json and prints a task count summary grouped by status.
acceptatiecriteria: Script exits 0 and prints counts for all 6 statuses (pending, in_progress, paused, review, test, done)
Handles empty queue gracefully (zero counts, no errors)
Passes bash -n and shellcheck with no warnings
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — read-only, no secrets, no network calls
mvp_template.tests_required: bash -n; shellcheck; run with empty queue.json; run with seeded queue.json
definition_of_done: test_report.md contains PASS with >=90% pass rate
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Delete artefacts/task-001/ — no system state changed
